module_title: A1 Review, Speaking and Everyday Tasks
lesson_title: A1 Review, Speaking and Everyday Tasks: Grammar Lesson 1
learning_objective: Learners can name, identify, ask and answer basic questions in a grammar task about places.
cefr_outcome: Learners can understand and use familiar everyday expressions and very basic phrases for immediate needs.
learner_facing_explanation: In this lesson you will practise grammar for a1 review, speaking and everyday tasks. You will learn useful language connected to places and practise singular/plural nouns. By the end, you should be able to complete a short real-life task and explain your answer clearly at A1 level.
complete_teaching_input: Focus language: singular/plural nouns. Vocabulary theme: places. The teacher introduces the target language in a meaningful context, models pronunciation and form, checks meaning with concept questions, and moves learners from controlled practice to freer use. At A1, learners should name, identify, ask and answer basic questions with increasing independence. The lesson should use board examples, short teacher modelling, pair practice, feedback and a final communicative task.
examples: Example 1: I can use singular/plural nouns to talk about places.
Example 2: The learner gives a A1 answer with clear meaning and correct key language.
Example 3: The learner checks, improves and repeats the answer after feedback.
Example 4: The learner uses one linking phrase or support phrase suitable for A1.

interactive_practice.prompt: Choose the best sentence using singular/plural nouns.
options: Correct use of singular/plural nouns in a A1 sentence.
Incorrect word order with singular/plural nouns.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Correct. The sentence uses singular/plural nouns accurately.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Check the form and meaning of singular/plural nouns.

interactive_practice.prompt: Match the places phrase to its meaning.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Good matching. You understand the phrase meaning.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Look again at the context and key words.

interactive_practice.prompt: Build a complete answer for the lesson task.
interactive_practice.model_answer: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand places.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Well done. Your sentence is complete and meaningful.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Check that your sentence has a subject, verb and clear meaning.

correct_answers.P3: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand places.

instant_feedback.correct: Correct. Continue to the next step.
instant_feedback.partly_correct: Good start. Check accuracy and add one more detail.
instant_feedback.incorrect: Try again. Review the model and look at the key language.

teacher_notes: Begin with a quick diagnostic question. Model the target form singular/plural nouns. Use choral repetition if pronunciation is important. Monitor pair work and record three common errors. Finish with delayed correction and one confidence-building success point.
homework_task: Write or record five sentences about places using language from this lesson.

assessment_task.task_title: A1 Grammar Check - A1 Review, Speaking and Everyday Tasks
assessment_task.instructions: Complete a short grammar task using singular/plural nouns and vocabulary from places.
success_criteria: Uses singular/plural nouns with reasonable accuracy
Responds at the expected CEFR level

criteria.name: Language control
criteria.descriptor: Uses singular/plural nouns and sentence structure accurately.

criteria.name: Vocabulary range
criteria.descriptor: Uses appropriate words connected to places.

criteria.name: Fluency/coherence
criteria.descriptor: Organises ideas clearly for the level.

speaking_task: Speak for 60-120 seconds about places. Use at least two examples and one reason.
writing_task: Write a short A1 response about places. Include the target language: singular/plural nouns.

listening_audio.script: Audio script for A1-M06-L01. Speaker one: Today we are practising places. Speaker two: I need to use singular/plural nouns correctly. Speaker one: Listen carefully and choose the answer that best matches the meaning.

visual_activity_cards.title: Singular/Plural Nouns form
visual_activity_cards.alt_text: Visual grammar card for singular/plural nouns
